name: Get Prospect Count and Sold status by OpCo

content.query:
SELECT 
cst.OperatingCompany
,lds.Sold
,count(cst.CustomerID) as ProspectCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 WHERE
 cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
 group by 
cst.OperatingCompany
,lds.Sold
order by  
ProspectCount desc
